---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or platform support
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use Case

What job are you trying to do? Which migration scenario does this address?

## Proposed Feature

What should be added or changed?

## Platform (if applicable)

Which EdTech platform does this relate to?
- [ ] ClassPlus
- [ ] AppX / CMS One
- [ ] Graphy
- [ ] YouTube
- [ ] New platform (specify): ___________

## Expected Behavior

How should the feature work from the operator's perspective?

## Priority

How critical is this to an active migration project?
- [ ] Blocking — I cannot complete a migration without this
- [ ] High — significantly improves efficiency
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — future improvement

## Additional Context

Any API documentation, sample responses, or technical notes that would help implement this.
